title: Trachymene gilleniae
taxonomy: Trachymene gilleniae is classified as a species within the genus Trachymene, which is a part of the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf and flower morphology. The family Apiaceae is further grouped into the order Apiales, which also includes other plant families like the Araliaceae. The order Apiales is a part of the clade Magnoliidae, a group of flowering plants that also includes the Laurales and Magnoliales. Trachymene gilleniae's classification helps to understand its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the same taxonomic group.
